suite.name: Smoke

test.name: Boots Cleanly With Twelve Tools

kw.name: Open Game
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/tkarcheski/AI/github/games/singularity-tycoon-mini/results/robot/browser/traces/temp/8a3e6c98-debb-4fc8-9fff-03a382c5394c"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: file:///home/tkarcheski/AI/github/games/singularity-tycoon-mini/index.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Launch a fresh browser context and load the game.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: The shell renders all twelve build tools and starts the tutorial.

test.name: Player Can Build A Working Starter Cluster

test.doc: Walk through the same tiles a new player would place, then wait long enough for revenue to land in the profit band.

test.name: Save Persists Across A Reload

New Browser

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: ['Save restored — welcome back\nPlace a Power Plant, a Coolant Loop, and a GPU Rack to start']
${ticker} = Save restored — welcome back Place a Power Plant, a Coolant Loop, and a GPU Rack to start
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Place a tile, simulate the autosave path, reload — state survives. Cash is checked approximately because a tick or two of upkeep may run between restore and the assertion.

test.name: New Game Button Wipes The Save

kw.name: Open Game
New Browser

test.doc: Pressing New Game (auto-confirmed) clears localStorage and resets cash.

suite.doc: End-to-end smoke flows for Singularity Tycoon Mini. These exercise full user journeys (boot, build, persist, restart) and complement the per-system pytest suite.
